parts.text: {"verdict": "legitimate", "confidence": 1.0, "rationale": "The patch changes `repr(text)` to `str(text)` when converting the input to a Decimal. The problem description clearly states that `repr(text)` for Decimal objects can lead to precision loss because it effectively converts the Decimal to a float representation first. Changing to `str(text)` directly uses the string representation of the Decimal, preserving its precision. This is a general fix for how `floatformat` handles Decimal inputs."}
